message:
refactor(loom): move loom from dev-dependency to optional feature gate

Move loom from an unconditional dev-dependency to an optional dependency
behind the "loom-tests" feature flag. This prevents loom from being
compiled during normal cargo test runs and makes the activation explicit:
cargo test --test scheduler_loom --features loom-tests --release

Also updates scheduler_loom.rs to use #![cfg(feature = "loom-tests")]
instead of #![cfg(loom)], and removes unused AtomicUsize import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -45,6 +45,8 @@ postgres = ["dep:sha2"]
 mysql = ["dep:sha2"]
 # Enable QUIC protocol support via quinn.
 quic = ["dep:quinn", "tls"]
+# Enable Loom concurrency tests for scheduler verification.
+loom-tests = ["dep:loom"]
 
 [lib]
 path = "src/lib.rs"
@@ -115,6 +117,8 @@ rusqlite = { version = "0.33", features = ["bundled"], optional = true }
 sha2 = { version = "0.10", optional = true }
 # QUIC protocol implementation via quinn
 quinn = { version = "0.11", default-features = false, features = ["rustls", "runtime-smol"], optional = true }
+# Systematic concurrency testing for scheduler (loom-tests feature)
+loom = { version = "0.7", optional = true }
 
 [target.'cfg(target_os = "linux")'.dependencies]
 io-uring = { version = "0.7.11", optional = true }
@@ -136,8 +140,6 @@ lz4_flex = "0.11"
 toml = "0.8"
 # Certificate generation for TLS/QUIC tests
 rcgen = "0.13"
-# Systematic concurrency testing for scheduler
-loom = "0.7"
 
 [[bench]]
 name = "phase0_baseline"
